phrases.text_local: Kde se platí parkování na ulici?
phrases.cultural_note: Parking in this area is typically paid via street meters. Always display the ticket on your dashboard.

likely_response.local: Automat je dole u křižovatky, naproti výčepu.
likely_response.translation_en: The meter is down at the intersection, opposite the taproom.

responses.english: The meter is down at the intersection, opposite the taproom.
responses.local: Automat je dole u křižovatky, naproti výčepu.

phrases.cultural_note: Piaristické náměstí is a historic square near the city center, often used as a landmark for navigation.

likely_response.local: Rovně a pak doleva kolem kostela.
likely_response.translation_en: Straight and then left past the church.

responses.english: Straight and then left past the church.
responses.local: Rovně a pak doleva kolem kostela.

phrases.cultural_note: Some traditional Czech pubs, especially in brewery districts, are cash-only. It is customary to check before ordering.

likely_response.local: Jen hotovost, bankomat je na rohu.
likely_response.translation_en: Cash only, the ATM is on the corner.

responses.english: Cash only, the ATM is on the corner.
responses.local: Jen hotovost, bankomat je na rohu.

phrases.intent_en: How to reach the main square tram
phrases.text_local: Jak se dostanu na tramvaj na hlavní náměstí?
phrases.cultural_note: Trams are a common way to reach Náměstí Přemysla Otakara II, the main square in České Budějovice.

likely_response.local: Tramvajová zastávka je tamhle za rohem, vlevo.
likely_response.translation_en: The tram stop is just around the corner, on the left.

responses.english: The tram stop is just around the corner, on the left.
responses.local: Tramvajová zastávka je tamhle za rohem, vlevo.

phrases.intent_en: Where to buy Budvar tour tickets
phrases.text_local: Kde koupím lístky na prohlídku Budvaru?
phrases.cultural_note: Tickets for the Budweiser Budvar brewery tour are typically sold at the brewery itself, not in the city center.

likely_response.local: V pokladně pivovaru, hned u hlavní brány.
likely_response.translation_en: At the brewery ticket office, right by the main gate.

responses.english: At the brewery ticket office, right by the main gate.
responses.local: V pokladně pivovaru, hned u hlavní brány.
